title: echinocereus engelmannii subsp. munzii
intro: Echinocereus engelmannii subsp. munzii, also known as Engelmann's hedgehog cactus or Munz's hedgehog cactus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the Echinocereus genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Echinocereus engelmannii subsp. munzii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, salves, and tinctures that can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
